profile_summary: Leisure traveler (high budget) prioritizing luxury & refinement, spa & wellness.

recommendations.justification: The Regent Heights, Lisbon ranks #1 for this traveler on luxury & refinement (+0.95), spa & wellness (+0.92), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool."

supporting_evidence.quote: The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.
Wonderful wellness facilities; the sauna and treatments left us completely refreshed.
A proper retreat: yoga in the morning and an excellent spa in the afternoon.

Wonderful wellness facilities; the sauna and treatments left us completely refreshed.
The level of refinement and personal service was world-class.
